data.title: What's Going On Microchip Technology Stock Premarket on Thursday?
data.description: Microchip Technology shares down premarket after announcing $1.35B public offering. Plans to use proceeds for capped call transactions and debt repayment.

data.title: China And Europe Markets Slide; Dollar Up 0.4%, Gold Steady Near Record Highs - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: U.S. markets rose after Fed holds rates steady and projects slower growth, higher inflation. Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq post gains. Markets react to tariffs and inflation uncertainty.

data.title: Bitcoin's Crisis Paradox Decoded: Bitwise CIO Explains 'Dip Then Rip' Phenomenon
data.description: Bitwise Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan explained Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) often contradictory behavior during market crises, despite its narrative as an inflation hedge.

data.title: Federal Reserve Brings Back 'Transitory' Inflation Amid Tariff War: Economist Mohamed El-Erian Calls It A 'Big Policy Mistake'
data.description: Mohamed El-Erian criticizes Fed Chair Jerome Powell's use of the word "transitory" to describe the potential inflationary impact of tariffs.

data.title: Bitcoin's Recent Struggles Aside, Gold Hit A New All-Time High Shining A Bright Spotlight On These Precious Metal Cryptos That Rocked In 2025
data.description:
Gold prices hit an all-time high Wednesday as the Federal Reserve projected slower economic growth and higher inflation, boosting demand for the safe haven.



What happened: Spot gold hit $3,056 per ounce earlier in the day before retracing slightly. Gold futures on the Commodity Exchange jumped to $3,060.20.
